sentences.en: Emma Woods walked into Doctor Emily Dyer's office, holding her stomach in pain.
sentences.zh: 艾玛·伍兹走进艾米莉·戴尔医生的诊所,捂着胃部,一脸痛苦。

sentences.en: "What did you eat for breakfast?" Emily asked, looking at her patient with concern.
sentences.zh: "你早餐吃了什么?"艾米莉问道,她关切地看着自己的病人。

sentences.en: Emma frowned. "I had fried dumplings and a big burger. They tasted so good!"
sentences.zh: 艾玛皱着眉头。"我吃了炸饺子和一个大汉堡。它们的味道好极了!"

sentences.en: Emily shook her head gently. "That much fat in your food can hurt your stomach."
sentences.zh: 艾米莉轻轻摇了摇头。"你食物里那么多脂肪会伤到你的胃。"

sentences.en: She handed Emma a small pill from a bottle on her desk.
sentences.zh: 她从桌上的药瓶里拿出一粒药丸递给艾玛。

sentences.en: "This medicine will help now, but you need a better diet," Emily explained.
sentences.zh: "这个药现在会有帮助,但你需要更好的日常饮食,"艾米莉解释道。

sentences.en: Emma looked surprised. "No more burgers? What should I eat instead?"
sentences.zh: 艾玛看起来很惊讶。"不能再吃汉堡了?那我应该吃什么?"

sentences.en: Emily smiled and held up a plate of salad. "Plain vegetables are gentle on your stomach."
sentences.zh: 艾米莉微笑着举起一盘蔬菜沙拉。"清淡的蔬菜对你的胃很温和。"

sentences.en: Emma took a bite of the salad. The taste was simple, but it felt right.
sentences.zh: 艾玛尝了一口沙拉。味道很简单,但感觉是对的。

sentences.en: "A healthy diet keeps your body firm and strong," Emily said, "and your stomach will feel flat and comfortable."
sentences.zh: "健康的饮食让你的身体结实又强壮,"艾米莉说,"而且你的胃会感到平坦舒适。"
